# host_mac_dock (Resource)

Manages the Dock persistent apps and folders as whole ordered lists.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "host_mac_dock" "default" {
  apps = [
    "/System/Applications/System Settings.app",
    "/Applications/Google Chrome.app",
  ]

  folders = [
    "/Users/dongho/Downloads",
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `apps` (List of String) Ordered `.app` bundle paths to show in the Dock persistent apps section. `~` is expanded to the provider `home_dir` and relative paths are resolved from the Terraform working directory.
- `folders` (List of String) Ordered folder paths to show in the Dock persistent folders section. `~` is expanded to the provider `home_dir` and relative paths are resolved from the Terraform working directory. Set `[]` for none.

### Optional

- `delete_on_destroy` (Boolean) Clear the managed Dock app and folder arrays on destroy. Defaults to false, leaving the current Dock unchanged.
- `restart` (Boolean) Restart Dock with `killall Dock` after writes or destructive deletes.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier, always `com.apple.dock`.
